name: Bircher Muesli
recipeIngredient: 1 medium-coarse chopped apple (red or golden delicious)
1 non-fat fruit yogurt (non-fat milk or soy-milk can be used)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Mix well and let sit for a few minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
3. Adjust thickness by adding more liquid if desired.
4. Serve and enjoy your homemade Bircher Muesli.
